description: Remove period filter, sort by scheduled_date, add client-side pagination to cards view, add rejetee to Terminées tab.

userStories.title: Remove PeriodSelector from dashboard
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want the dashboard to show all my interventions without a confusing date filter, so I can focus on status-based tabs.
acceptanceCriteria: PeriodSelector component removed from dashboard header (both mobile and desktop)
period state, filteredInterventions date-filter useMemo, and progressData removed
Stats cards no longer show progressData
userStories.notes: Removed PeriodSelector import, period state, filteredInterventions, progressData, celebration toast, period reset. Also removed toast import (no longer used).

userStories.title: Add rejetee to dashboard Terminées tab
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want rejected interventions to appear in the Terminées tab, so no intervention falls through the cracks.
acceptanceCriteria: terminees filter in interventions-navigator.tsx includes 'rejetee' status
userStories.notes: Added 'rejetee' to terminees filter array in interventions-navigator.tsx

userStories.title: Sort by scheduled_date (unscheduled first)
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want interventions sorted by scheduled date with unscheduled ones first, so I see what needs attention immediately.
acceptanceCriteria: New sort option 'scheduled-asc' in SORT_OPTIONS: 'Date planifiée'
Sort logic: unscheduled (NULL scheduled_date) first sorted by urgency DESC then created_at DESC, then overdue (past) most overdue first, then upcoming soonest first
Other sort options still available in dropdown
userStories.notes: Added 'scheduled' to SortField type, new SORT_OPTIONS entry, 3-tier sort logic (null→overdue→upcoming), default for dashboard preset.

userStories.title: Client-side pagination on cards view
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want the cards view to show 12 items per page with pagination controls, so the dashboard renders fast even with 100+ interventions.
acceptanceCriteria: Cards view shows max 12 items per page (4 rows × 3 cols on desktop)
Pagination controls at bottom of cards grid (< Page X of Y >)
userStories.notes: Second usePagination instance for cards (pageSize: 12). Destructured resetToFirstPage to avoid ESLint dependency warning. Pagination hidden when totalPages <= 1.
